articles.title: They’ve finally won consecutive games, but we’re going to need to see more, and other thoughts on the Red Sox’ 4-8 start
articles.description:
The Red Sox found time to put that clashing, atomic-green Monster energy drink logo on the Monster. They should have added another bat or two to hit the ball over it.

The post They’ve finally won consecutive games, but we’re going to need to see more, and other thoughts on the Red Sox’ 4-8 start appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox achieved consecutive wins, improving their record to 4-8 this season.
Fans express concern over the team's need for additional offensive players.
Local businesses near Fenway Park hope for increased attendance as the season progresses.

articles.title: Police search for owner, dog after man and dog are attacked in Everett
articles.description:
Police say the owner of the attacking dog left the scene before first responders arrived.

The post Police search for owner, dog after man and dog are attacked in Everett appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police are searching for a dog owner involved in an attack in Everett.
The attacking dog and owner left the scene before first responders arrived.
Residents are urged to report sightings to ensure community safety.

articles.title: Mass. House passes bill restricting teen social media and phones in schools
articles.description:
The bill would ban phones in schools and require parental consent for 14- and 15-year-olds to access social media.

The post Mass. House passes bill restricting teen social media and phones in schools appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts House passed a bill banning phones in schools on April 9, 2026.
The bill requires parental consent for 14- and 15-year-olds to access social media.
This legislation aims to reduce distractions and improve focus among Boston students.
